expectations.text: Creates a top-level Acme-Corp or acme-corp directory
expectations.evidence: Structure shows Acme-Corp/ as directory under Consulting/Clients/

expectations.text: Includes at minimum: contracts, deliverables, invoices, and meeting-notes subdirectories
expectations.evidence: All four present: Contracts/, Deliverables/, Invoices/, Meeting-Notes/ plus Communications/

expectations.text: Provides a script or code to create the structure
expectations.evidence: Python script with create_client_structure function using pathlib

expectations.text: Follows the consulting client pattern from the skill
expectations.evidence: Explicitly references 'skill's consulting client template', nests under Consulting/Clients/, includes Communications/ folder from skill pattern

expectations.text: Structure is created in a sensible location or user is asked about location
expectations.evidence: Asks 'Where should this be created?' with three suggested options, defaults to ~/Consulting/Clients/
